message:
feat(twilio): add Conversations API for multi-channel messaging (7 operations)

Add twilio.conversation.{create,get,list}, participant.{add,remove},
and message.{send,list} operations using the Conversations REST API
(conversations.twilio.com/v1). Includes new rate limit pool, manifest
entries with network constraints, golden vector updates, and type
definitions for conversations, participants, and messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"

-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:9cd41f1d641e37715cdcd21c3da9f970748d16868fefcc0b41034f002a343463"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:7fcf0deedf57a8c19bbad51ab4a86dc7600ffffd4875126c19d4b49cbfbcc3d8"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.twilio"
@@ -1490,6 +1490,376 @@ common_mistakes = []

 related = ["twilio.whatsapp_get", "twilio.whatsapp_send"]
 
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Conversations API Operations
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create"]
+description = "Create a new multi-channel conversation"
+capability = "twilio.conversations"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create".input_schema.properties.friendly_name]
+type = "string"
+description = "Human-readable name for the conversation"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create".input_schema.properties.unique_name]
+type = "string"
+description = "Unique identifier name"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["sid"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create".output_schema.properties.sid]
+type = "string"
+description = "Conversation SID"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create".output_schema.properties.friendly_name]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create".output_schema.properties.state]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["conversations.twilio.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.create".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Create a new multi-participant conversation for cross-channel messaging."
+common_mistakes = ["Forgetting to add participants after creating the conversation."]
+examples = ['{"friendly_name": "Support Chat #42"}']
+related = ["twilio.conversation.participant.add", "twilio.conversation.message.send"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.get"]
+description = "Get conversation details by SID"
+capability = "twilio.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.get".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.get".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["conversation_sid"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.get".input_schema.properties.conversation_sid]
+type = "string"
+description = "Conversation SID"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.get".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["sid"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.get".output_schema.properties.sid]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.get".output_schema.properties.friendly_name]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.get".output_schema.properties.state]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.get".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["conversations.twilio.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.get".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Retrieve details of a specific conversation by its SID."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"conversation_sid": "CHxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"}']
+related = ["twilio.conversation.list"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.list"]
+description = "List conversations with pagination"
+capability = "twilio.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.list".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.list".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.list".input_schema.properties.page_size]
+type = "integer"
+description = "Results per page (max 100)"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.list".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.list".output_schema.properties.conversations]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.list".output_schema.properties.meta]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.list".network_constraints]

+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true

+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add"]
+description = "Add a participant to a conversation"
+capability = "twilio.conversations.participants"
+risk_level = "high"

+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".input_schema]

+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".input_schema.properties.conversation_sid]
+type = "string"
+description = "Conversation SID"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".input_schema.properties.identity]
+type = "string"
+description = "Chat identity of the participant"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".input_schema.properties.messaging_address]
+type = "string"

+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".input_schema.properties.messaging_proxy_address]

+description = "Twilio proxy phone number"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["sid"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".output_schema.properties.sid]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".output_schema.properties.conversation_sid]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".output_schema.properties.identity]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["conversations.twilio.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.add".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Add a person to an existing conversation by identity or phone number."
+common_mistakes = ["Must provide either identity or messaging_address.", "messaging_proxy_address is required when using messaging_address."]
+examples = ['{"conversation_sid": "CHxxx", "identity": "user@example.com"}']
+related = ["twilio.conversation.participant.remove"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.remove"]
+description = "Remove a participant from a conversation"
+capability = "twilio.conversations.participants"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.remove".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.remove".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["conversation_sid", "participant_sid"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.remove".input_schema.properties.conversation_sid]
+type = "string"
+description = "Conversation SID"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.remove".input_schema.properties.participant_sid]
+type = "string"
+description = "Participant SID to remove"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.remove".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.remove".output_schema.properties.success]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.remove".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["conversations.twilio.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.participant.remove".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Remove a participant from a conversation. This is irreversible."
+common_mistakes = ["Removing the last participant effectively closes the conversation."]
+examples = ['{"conversation_sid": "CHxxx", "participant_sid": "MBxxx"}']
+related = ["twilio.conversation.participant.add"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.send"]
+description = "Send a message into a conversation"

+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.send".output_schema]
+type = "object"

+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.send".output_schema.properties.sid]

+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.send".output_schema.properties.body]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.send".output_schema.properties.author]

+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.send".output_schema.properties.index]

+related = ["twilio.conversation.message.list"]

+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.list"]

+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.list".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["conversation_sid"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.list".input_schema.properties.conversation_sid]
+type = "string"
+description = "Conversation SID"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.list".input_schema.properties.page_size]
+type = "integer"
+description = "Results per page"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.list".input_schema.properties.order]
+type = "string"
+description = "Sort order: asc or desc"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.list".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.list".output_schema.properties.messages]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.list".output_schema.properties.meta]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.list".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["conversations.twilio.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.conversation.message.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "List messages within a specific conversation."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"conversation_sid": "CHxxx", "page_size": 50}']
+related = ["twilio.conversation.message.send"]
+
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 # Streaming / Event Capabilities
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@@ -1552,6 +1922,14 @@ window_ms = 60000
 burst = 10
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "twilio.conversations"
+description = "Conversations API operations"
+requests = 60
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 10
+scope = "instance"
+
 [rate_limits.operation_pools]
 "twilio.send_message" = ["twilio.message"]
 "twilio.get_message" = ["twilio.read"]
@@ -1572,3 +1950,10 @@ scope = "instance"
 "twilio.whatsapp_send_template" = ["twilio.message"]
 "twilio.whatsapp_get" = ["twilio.read"]
 "twilio.whatsapp_list" = ["twilio.read"]
+"twilio.conversation.create" = ["twilio.conversations"]
+"twilio.conversation.get" = ["twilio.read"]
+"twilio.conversation.list" = ["twilio.read"]
+"twilio.conversation.participant.add" = ["twilio.conversations"]
+"twilio.conversation.participant.remove" = ["twilio.conversations"]
+"twilio.conversation.message.send" = ["twilio.conversations"]
+"twilio.conversation.message.list" = ["twilio.read"]

@@ -172,6 +172,72 @@ pub struct WhatsAppMessage {
     pub uri: Option<String>,
 }
 
+// ── Conversations API types ───────────────────────────────────
+
+/// A Twilio Conversation.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct TwilioConversation {
+    pub sid: String,
+    pub friendly_name: Option<String>,
+    pub state: Option<String>,
+    pub date_created: Option<String>,
+    pub date_updated: Option<String>,
+    pub unique_name: Option<String>,
+    pub chat_service_sid: Option<String>,
+    pub messaging_service_sid: Option<String>,
+    pub url: Option<String>,
+}
+
+/// A participant in a Twilio Conversation.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct ConversationParticipant {
+    pub sid: String,
+    pub conversation_sid: Option<String>,
+    pub identity: Option<String>,
+    pub messaging_binding: Option<serde_json::Value>,
+    pub date_created: Option<String>,
+    pub date_updated: Option<String>,
+    pub url: Option<String>,
+    pub role_sid: Option<String>,
+}
+
+/// A message in a Twilio Conversation.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct ConversationMessage {
+    pub sid: String,
+    pub conversation_sid: Option<String>,
+    pub author: Option<String>,
+    pub body: Option<String>,
+    pub index: Option<u32>,
+    pub date_created: Option<String>,
+    pub date_updated: Option<String>,
+    pub url: Option<String>,
+    pub participant_sid: Option<String>,
+}
+
+/// Twilio list response wrapper for conversations.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize)]
+pub struct ConversationListResponse {
+    pub conversations: Vec<serde_json::Value>,
+    pub meta: Option<ConversationMeta>,
+}
+
+/// Twilio list response wrapper for conversation messages.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize)]
+pub struct ConversationMessageListResponse {
+    pub messages: Vec<serde_json::Value>,
+    pub meta: Option<ConversationMeta>,
+}
+
+/// Metadata for paginated Conversations API responses.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct ConversationMeta {
+    pub page: Option<u32>,
+    pub page_size: Option<u32>,
+    pub next_page_url: Option<String>,
+    pub previous_page_url: Option<String>,
+}
+
 /// Twilio API error response.
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize)]
 pub struct ApiErrorResponse {
